name: swapit
description: Stateful, local-first household toxics inventory + swap engine. Identify items carrying endocrine disruptors / persistent chemicals, score by real exposure, track swaps to safer alternatives. Ships a grounded, cited knowledge graph. Hands sourcing to the procurer skill. Zero paid services.

mode.description: Skill mode: init (load seed knowledge), add (add an item), assess (score an item/class), list (inventory), swap (track a swap), score (household summary), report (HTML), procure (procurer handoff brief), knowledge (browse graph), rooms (manage rooms), bookmark (save a link), selfheal (validate integrity), serve (live local dashboard), contribute (queue an anonymized knowledge fact), sync (push/pull the commons, opt-in).

item_class.description: Item-class id from the knowledge graph (add/assess), e.g. nonstick-cookware, polycarbonate-bottle, vinyl-shower-curtain.

target.description: Item id or swap id (procure mode).

room.description: Room/zone for an item (kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, nursery, garage, ...).

condition.description: Physical condition — damaged/scratched coatings leach more.

frequency.description: How often the item is used (drives exposure weighting).

heat.description: Item is used with heat (cooking, hot liquids, microwave).

child_contact.description: Item is mouthed/handled by a child (amplifies risk).

to.description: Chosen alternative id (swap mode), e.g. cast-iron-skillet, glass-food-container.

json.description: Emit machine-readable JSON instead of formatted text.
